title: Add PerChamp - AI Image Generation App to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: New app blooming: PerChamp
gist.blurb: Another app just sprouted in the community garden. PerChamp is now using our image generation API to turn text prompts into pixels on Android.
gist.summary: Added PerChamp, a new Android-based AI image generation app, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: The community directory grows, giving developers another real-world example of the Pollinations API in action.
gist.visual_concept: PerChamp is a mobile app for generating images. The visual should feature Polly the bee interacting with a mobile phone that is generating art, set in a cozy garden environment.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a tiny retro smartphone that displays a beautiful generated landscape. The bee is hovering in a digital garden with lime green (#ecf874) code-plants sprouting from terracotta pots. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a tiny retro smartphone that displays a beautiful generated landscape. The bee is hovering in a digital garden with lime green (#ecf874) code-plants sprouting from terracotta pots. Soft pastel gradient background.
